title: Unity Software (U) Stock Forecast & Analyst Price Targets
text: Consensus Rating and Targets: Unity Software Inc has a consensus price target of $34.95 based on the ratings of 26 analysts. The lowest target is $16 and the highest is $59. Rating Distribution: The stock rating distribution of U is 34.72% HOLD, 62.5% BUY and 2.78% SELL. Recent Analyst Updates: Multiple analysts have updated their price targets in recent months including Morgan Stanley, Wedbush, Wells Fargo, and Needham & Company. Recent upgrades reflect confidence in Vector platform growth and the company's path to profitability. Key Analyst Themes: Analysts highlight Vector platform momentum, subscription revenue growth from Unity 6, and the strategic turnaround from CEO Matt Bromberg's leadership. Concerns remain around near-term profitability and the impact of the IronSource divestment on ad network revenues. Target Price Range: Conservative estimates place U at $16-25, with moderate estimates at $25-40, and bullish estimates exceeding $40. These ranges reflect different views on execution risk and market opportunity.
